title: Machines Making Gods: Philip K. Dick, Henri Bergson and Saint Paul
author: James Burton
card_summary: A scholarly article from Theory, Culture & Society (Vol. 25, No. 7-8, December 2008) connecting Dick's fiction to the philosophy of Henri Bergson and the theology of Saint Paul. Burton, who later wrote a full monograph on Dick and Bergson, examines the relationship between technology, divinity, and creative evolution. 23 pages.
